name: Smartsheet
tagline: Enterprise work management platform built on a spreadsheet
description: Smartsheet is a work management platform that combines the familiarity of spreadsheets with project management features like Gantt charts, automations, and dashboards. Popular with operations and PMO teams at mid-market and enterprise companies.
use_cases: Your operations or PMO team lives in spreadsheets and needs Gantt charts and automations without retraining staff on a new interface
You're running construction, manufacturing, or event projects that require resource management and portfolio-level Gantt views
Your team needs to collect structured data via forms that feed directly into project sheets with automated approval workflows
You work in an enterprise that mandates SSO, admin controls, and audit trails for project data — features Smartsheet's Enterprise tier handles natively
